name: Makeswift Visual Website Builder API
what_it_does: Visual website builder for Next.js with REST API — enabling marketing teams to build and edit web pages visually in a live Next.js application without code changes, registering React components for marketer composition, with content management, A/B testing, and publishing workflow, designed exclusively as a Next.js-native visual editing layer.
use_cases: Adding visual page editing capability to existing Next.js applications via Makeswift SDK and API
Enabling marketing teams to build landing pages from developer-defined React components
Managing page content and scheduling publishes via Makeswift API for content automation
Running A/B tests on page variants via Makeswift API for CRO workflows
Integrating Makeswift page content with analytics and marketing tools via webhook
not_for: Non-Next.js applications (Makeswift is Next.js-exclusive — no Vue, Nuxt, or other frameworks)
Complex content management beyond page building (use Contentful for comprehensive CMS)
Enterprise DXP with personalization engine and marketing automation
best_when: A Next.js team wants to give marketing teams visual editing capability within their existing Next.js app — with the developer defining allowed components and marketers assembling pages without touching code.
avoid_when: You're not using Next.js, need multi-framework support, require complex headless CMS features, or need enterprise workflow with approval chains.

auth.notes: API key from Makeswift dashboard. Site-scoped access. Webhook for publish events. REST API for content delivery. Next.js SDK (@makeswift/runtime) for visual editor integration. Next.js App Router and Pages Router support. No OAuth2. No fine-grained scopes — API key provides full site access.

pricing.notes: San Francisco company. Founded 2020. Raised $3M seed (2021). Bootstrapped-focused growth. YCombinator alumni. Next.js-exclusive focus differentiates from multi-framework tools (Builder.io, Plasmic). Native Next.js App Router support. Acquired by BigCommerce in 2023 — provides BigCommerce integration depth and enterprise backing. Post-acquisition: BigCommerce visual page builder powered by Makeswift. Smaller independent team but BigCommerce backing provides stability.

agent_readiness.error_message_notes: REST API for content delivery. API key auth. Good documentation for Next.js integration. Webhook for publish events. Next.js SDK required for visual editing. BigCommerce acquisition (2023) may affect product direction. US data residency only. Rate limits not documented.
agent_readiness.idempotency_notes: Page reads fully idempotent. Content queries idempotent by page path. Publish operations idempotent by page ID.
known_agent_gotchas: Next.js exclusive — no support for Vue, Nuxt, Angular, or other frameworks
BigCommerce acquisition (2023) — product direction may shift toward BigCommerce ecosystem
API key provides full site access — no granular scope control
US data residency only — EU customers need GDPR adequacy assessment
Rate limits not documented — implement conservative throttling

security_score_components.security_notes: TLS enforced. SOC2 and GDPR compliant. US data residency. API key auth. BigCommerce backing provides enterprise security standards. API key provides full site access — protect carefully. No OAuth2 or fine-grained scopes. BigCommerce acquisition means commercial backing and enterprise customer expectations. Page content accessible to authenticated editors — role-based access management needed.
